expected_effect: Improve success rate on recoverable interaction failures with a small latency increase.

intervention.expected_effect: Improve success rate on recoverable interaction failures with a small latency increase.
intervention.rationale: Candidate failures are dominated by `invalid_action`, which may be recoverable with one bounded retry.
intervention.risk: May hide deeper policy issues and can increase step count on tasks that are already looping.
intervention.summary: Enable a conservative retry policy for invalid-action or no-progress failures.
